title: gratiola hispidula
intro: Gratiola hispidula, also known as hispid pennyroyal, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gratiola hispidula include relief from muscle spasms, anxiety, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Gratiola hispidula can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
